steps.title: Compare volcano types
steps.content: The passage begins by saying not all volcanoes are the same. Ischia is presented as a complex volcano, while Mount Vsevidof is presented as a stratovolcano, a different type.

steps.title: Signal the difference
steps.content: Choice A would mean regardless of that point. Choice C would intensify or confirm the prior idea, and Choice D would conclude the discussion. The sentence needs a transition showing that Mount Vsevidof differs from Ischia. The answer is B.
